NAME: Full borrow and return flow — from request to confirmed return
User can edit item name and description
User can create an item and see it in inventory
User can create a new group and become its moderator
User can add a new item to their inventory
User can delete an available item
Profile page loads and displays personal information
Groups list page loads and displays correctly
Items list page loads and search is available
Moderator can generate an invite link for their group
Moderator can edit group name and description
User can update their bio on the profile page
User can log in with email and password
User can create a group and see it in the groups list
